summary: Case Converter Tool - A text utility that converts input text between uppercase and lowercase formats

existing_features.title: Create a centered text input area with placeholder text 'Enter your text here...' that accepts multi-line text input
Implement an UPPERCASE button that converts all text in the input area to uppercase when clicked
Implement a lowercase button that converts all text in the input area to lowercase when clicked
Apply a clean, modern design with centered layout, appropriate spacing between elements, and a minimalist aesthetic using neutral colors and simple typography

new_feature_requests.summary: Text input area for user to enter text
Button to convert text to uppercase
Button to convert text to lowercase
